action.reasoning: Observation: Predictions are all 'R' tokens even on training data, despite training loss ~1.32. This indicates either the checkpoint is not loaded correctly, the encoder provides no useful signal, or the preprocessing destroys features. Need diagnosis to understand root cause before further training. Analysis: Possible causes: (1) Inversion of images may harm pretrained features; (2) State dict mismatch; (3) Model ignoring memory; (4) Beam search bug. Decision: Write and run a diagnostic script to inspect vocab mapping, checkpoint loading, encoder output statistics, and first-token logit distributions on real vs noise inputs. Based on findings, next iteration will apply targeted fix and retrain.
